data.headline: Meridian Total Net Leverage Ratio of 3.42x is within the 3.50x covenant threshold after permitted addbacks.

sentences.text: The borrower's reported Consolidated EBITDA is 118.3 and Consolidated Total Net Debt is 420.0.
The covenant threshold for the Total Net Leverage Ratio is 3.50x.
The calculation begins with Consolidated Total Net Debt of 420.0 as the numerator.
The denominator starts with Consolidated EBITDA (LTM) base of 118.3.
An addback of 4.5 for Project Atlas acquisition one-time costs is permitted under Amendment No. 1, clause (d) with a $10M cap.
The adjusted denominator is 122.8, yielding a ratio of 3.42x.
All four transactions (T1135, T1136, T1137, T1138) are one-time and acquisition-related, totaling 4.5, which qualifies for the addback.
The final ratio of 3.42x is below the 3.50x covenant threshold, indicating no breach.
